questionHtml:
A different series of pepsin samples is used to develop a calibration curve.

                          

Estimate the concentration of an unknown sample of pepsin with an absorbance of 0.30 from the graph.
markschemeHtml:
0.65 «μg cm–3»

Accept any value in the range 0.60–0.70 «μg cm–3»

[1 mark]

meta.title: A different series of pepsin samples is used to develop a calibration curve. Estimate the concentration of an unknown sample of pepsin with an absorbance of 0.30 from the graph.
